# Save, Send, Comment, and Follow Tactics

## Save tactics

Saves happen when the viewer thinks:

```text
I will need this later.
```

### Best save formats

```text
checklists
templates
step-by-step processes
swipe files
rules
decision trees
before-posting checks
editing recipes
frameworks
settings
scripts
prompts
```

### Save CTA formulas

Weak:

```text
Save this.
```

Better:

```text
Save this before editing your next Reel.
```

Stronger:

```text
Save this caption placement checklist before posting.
```

## Send/share tactics

Shares happen when the viewer thinks:

```text
Someone else should see this.
```

### Share triggers

```text
social warning
identity recognition
shared problem
argument support
funny truth
useful fix
```

### Strong send CTAs

```text
Send this to someone who puts captions over faces.
Send this to someone editing Reels this week.
Send this to the friend who still thinks #FYP is a strategy.
Send this to whoever edits your clips.
```

## Comment tactics

Good comment prompts are low-friction and useful.

### Good prompts

```text
A or B: which hook is stronger?
Which one would you swipe on?
What niche should I test this on next?
Drop your first line and I’ll rewrite it.
Which caption placement is clearer?
```

### Weak prompts

```text
Thoughts?
Do you agree?
Comment YES.
Algorithm test, please comment.
```

## Follow tactics

Follows happen when the viewer thinks:

```text
This account will keep solving my problem.
```

### Follow conversion tactics

1. Use named series:

```text
Hook Lab
Caption Lab
Retention Clinic
Algorithm Autopsy
Shorts Surgery
First-Frame Lab
Viral Mechanism Breakdown
```

2. Use a series promise:

Weak:

```text
Follow for more.
```

Better:

```text
Follow for more retention teardowns like this.
```

Stronger:

```text
I’m testing one short-form growth variable every day. Follow the lab.
```

3. Show original judgment:

```text
generic advice = useful but forgettable
specific judgment = followable
```

4. Build recurring formats:

```text
Monday: hook teardown
Tuesday: first-frame test
Wednesday: caption lab
Thursday: retention diagnosis
Friday: algorithm myth-bust
```
